other_observers: MOB; No. Cole Wild first found the bird/birds.
specific_location: South of Loveland just south of Cattail Pond on the community public path that runs east/west.
description: I do have a picture. It shows the white malar and the very dark black eyeline. Of course the Eastern Meadowlark song is very distinctive and quite different from the Western Meadowlark song. High contrast head pattern on the eastern compared with the much duller pattern on the western was very noticable.Behaviors: Calling, chasing and singing, evidently in breeding behavior.Call: Eastern song and calls.Plumage: Breeding
